extDescription.message: Drag a link to open it in a floating preview window.

dropHintFullscreen.message: Release anywhere to open a preview

errorLoadFailed.message: Couldn't open this page in the preview. Try opening it in a new tab.

hintThemeDark.message: Darker colors that are easier on the eyes in low light.

hintThemeLight.message: Lighter colors that fit bright pages better.

hintLanguage.message: Choose the language used by Glimpser.

hintCorners.message: Choose whether preview windows use rounded or square corners.

hintCornerRadius.message: Adjusts how rounded preview window corners look.

hintPreviewTriggerRelease.message: After a deliberate drag, release anywhere on the page to open a preview.

hintPreviewTriggerDropArea.message: Only open a preview when the link is released on the visible drop area.

hintPosBottom.message: Show a fixed drop area at the bottom of the page. Drag a link onto it to open a preview.

hintPosTop.message: Show a fixed drop area at the top of the page. Drag a link onto it to open a preview.

hintSize.message: Sets the width and height of the drop area. Only used in Drop area mode.

hintDefaultWindowSize.message: Sets the default size for newly opened preview windows.

hintMaxPreviewWindows.message: When set to 1, previews use a backdrop you can click to close. Higher limits keep previews free-floating.

hintWindowOffset.message: Sets how far a new preview window is offset from the active one.

labelClosePreviewOnOpenNewTab.message: Close preview after opening in a new tab

hintClosePreviewOnOpenNewTab.message: If turned on, opening a page in a new tab also closes its preview window.

hintBlacklistCurrentDomain.message: Add the current page's exact hostname, such as example.com or www.example.com, to disable previews here.

hintBlacklistExactMatch.message: Domain matching is exact. For example, example.com and www.example.com are treated as different domains.

hintBlacklistList.message: Previews are disabled only when the page hostname exactly matches a blocked domain.

hintShowCloseOthersButton.message: Shows a toolbar button that keeps the active preview open and closes the rest.

hintShowCloseAllButton.message: Shows a toolbar button that closes every open preview window.

aboutDescText.message: Drag a link to open it in a floating preview window without leaving the page.
